title: GraphQL Configuration
description: Configuration file for GraphQL LSP and related tools

documents.description: Document patterns for queries, mutations, and fragments

client.description: GraphQL client library used in this project, determines available client-side directives

extractConfig.description: Configuration for extracting GraphQL from TypeScript/JavaScript files. Schema mirrors @graphql-tools/graphql-tag-pluck. Mutually exclusive with `pluckConfig` (alias).

pluckConfig.description: Alias for `extractConfig`, provided for users migrating from @graphql-tools/graphql-tag-pluck or @graphql-eslint. Same shape and semantics. Mutually exclusive with `extractConfig`.

resolvedSchema.description: Path to a resolved/final schema file. When set, queries are validated against this schema instead of the source schema files. Source files are still used for go-to-definition navigation. Useful when a build pipeline transforms the schema (e.g. directive-based transforms).

oneOf.description: Single schema file path, glob pattern, or HTTP URL

items.description: Schema file path, glob pattern, or HTTP URL

IntrospectionSchemaConfig.description: Configuration for introspecting a remote GraphQL endpoint

url.description: The GraphQL endpoint URL to introspect

headers.description: HTTP headers to include in the introspection request (e.g., for authentication)

retry.description: Number of retry attempts on failure (default: 0)

ClientConfig.description: GraphQL client library. Determines which client-side directives are available for validation.

ExtractConfig.description: Configuration for extracting GraphQL from TypeScript/JavaScript. Schema mirrors @graphql-tools/graphql-tag-pluck so configs are portable between tools.

modules.description: Modules whose imports of GraphQL tags are recognized. Each entry is either a string (shorthand for { name }) or an object with a required `name` and optional `identifier` constraining which export from the module is the GraphQL tag.

identifier.description: Only the export with this name is recognized as the GraphQL tag. When unset, default imports from this module are recognized; named imports fall through to `globalGqlIdentifierName`.

gqlMagicComment.description: Magic comment to look for (e.g., /* graphql */ `query`).

globalGqlIdentifierName.description: Identifiers recognized as GraphQL tags without an import. Pass `false` (or an empty array) to disable bare/global tag extraction.

gqlVueBlock.description: Vue SFC block name (e.g. `graphql`) that contains raw GraphQL source. Blocks with this name are extracted directly without going through tagged-template logic.

skipIndent.description: If true, normalize indentation by stripping the minimum common leading whitespace from extracted GraphQL.

oneOf.description: Full configuration with extends and rules

FullLintConfig.description: Full lint configuration with optional extends and rules

noDeprecated.description: Warn about usage of deprecated fields and enum values

noAnonymousOperations.description: Require all operations to have names

uniqueNames.description: Ensure operation and fragment names are unique across the project

requireIdField.description: Require selection of ID fields on object types

requireImportFragment.description: Require fragment spreads to have a corresponding import comment

requireSelections.description: Enforce required field selections (e.g. id, __typename) on object types for cache normalization

noUnusedFragments.description: Warn about fragments that are defined but never used

noUnusedFields.description: Warn about fields that are selected but unused

noUnusedVariables.description: Warn about variables that are declared but never used

operationNameSuffix.description: Require operation names to have a specific suffix (Query, Mutation, Subscription)

alphabetize.description: Enforce alphabetical ordering of fields, arguments, and variables in selections

loneExecutableDefinition.description: Requires each file to contain only one executable definition (operation or fragment)

matchDocumentFilename.description: Enforces that operation and fragment names match the filename

namingConvention.description: Enforces naming conventions for operations, fragments, and variables

noDuplicateFields.description: Disallows duplicate fields within the same selection set

selectionSetDepth.description: Limits the depth of selection set nesting to prevent overly complex queries

noOnePlaceFragments.description: Detects fragments that are used in only one place and could be inlined

descriptionStyle.description: Enforces consistent description style (block vs inline)

inputName.description: Enforces that input type names end with a specific suffix

noHashtagDescription.description: Disallows using # comments as type descriptions in schema

noRootType.description: Disallows certain root type definitions in the schema

noTypenamePrefix.description: Disallows field names that are prefixed with their parent type name

noUnreachableTypes.description: Detects types that are not reachable from any root operation type

uniqueEnumValueNames.description: Detects duplicate enum value names across different enum types

relayConnectionTypes.description: Enforces Relay connection type conventions on types ending in 'Connection'

requireDeprecationReason.description: Requires a reason argument in @deprecated directives

requireFieldOfTypeQueryInMutationResult.description: Requires mutation result types to include a field of the Query type

requireNullableFieldsWithOneof.description: Requires all fields in @oneOf input types to be nullable

requireNullableResultInRoot.description: Requires root type fields to return nullable types for error resilience

requireTypePatternWithOneof.description: Enforces that types with @oneOf directive contain both 'ok' and 'error' fields

restyFieldNames.description: Warns when field names use REST-style prefixes like get, list, post, etc.

strictIdInTypes.description: Requires object types to have an ID field

noScalarResultTypeOnMutation.description: Disallows scalar return types on mutation fields

relayArguments.description: Enforces Relay-compliant pagination arguments on connection fields

requireDeprecationDate.description: Requires @deprecated directives to include a deletion date

LintRuleConfig.description: Configuration for a single lint rule

LintSeverity.description: Severity level for a lint rule
